expectations.text: Uses font-serif italic for main headings
expectations.evidence: Line 69: 'text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif italic text-on-surface' used for hero heading; Line 176: 'font-serif italic text-2xl' for section title; Line 323: 'font-serif italic text-on-surface' for Recent sessions heading

expectations.text: Cards have rounded-[2rem] or larger border radius
expectations.evidence: Line 88: 'rounded-[2rem] sm:rounded-[3rem]' on stat cards; Line 167: 'rounded-[2rem] sm:rounded-[3rem]' on progress chart; Line 261: 'rounded-[2rem] sm:rounded-[3rem]' on recommended card; Line 359: 'rounded-3xl' on list items

expectations.text: Includes decorative blur glow elements on cards
expectations.evidence: Line 90: 'bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-3xl -mr-16 -mt-16'; Line 115: 'bg-secondary-fixed/10 rounded-full blur-3xl'; Line 139: 'bg-lime-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl'; Line 169: 'bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-3xl'; Line 263: 'bg-secondary-fixed/10 rounded-full blur-3xl'
Line 1: 'import { motion } from "motion/react"' — correct package used throughout with motion.header, motion.section, motion.div, motion.button, motion.nav

expectations.text: Primary color #0059b6 is used for accents
expectations.evidence: Uses theme tokens consistently: 'text-primary', 'bg-primary', 'from-primary-container to-primary', 'shadow-primary/20' — all referencing the blue #0059b6 palette
Line 69: 'text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl'; Line 83: 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3'; Line 160: 'grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-5'; Line 261: 'sm:rounded-[3rem]'
Lines 3-11: imports Flame, Play, Clock, CheckCircle2, Sparkles, ChevronRight, Bell, Search from lucide-react

expectations.text: Stat numbers are large and use serif italic font
expectations.evidence: Line 100: 'text-5xl font-serif italic text-on-surface tracking-tight' for '143'; Line 125: 'text-5xl font-serif italic' for '12'; Line 149: 'text-5xl font-serif italic text-lime-400' for '7'

claims.claim: Component includes a weekly bar chart with animated bars
claims.evidence: Lines 186-230: Animated bar chart with spring animations per bar

claims.claim: Bottom navigation follows Sanctuary floating pill pattern
claims.evidence: Line 393: 'fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-md bg-inverse-surface/90 backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-full'

eval_feedback.overall: With-skill output closely matches Sanctuary design system. All assertions pass with strong evidence.
